name: Tool Logger
description: Logs all tool executions with timestamps, inputs, and outputs to a local audit file for debugging and compliance.
author: swarmclaw

name: Shell Gate
description: Blocks dangerous shell commands like rm -rf /, chmod 777, and dd before they reach the terminal. Configurable blocklist.
author: swarmclaw

name: Token Limiter
description: Limits the maximum tokens per agent response to prevent runaway costs. Configurable per-model thresholds.
author: swarmclaw

name: Memory Auto-Save
description: Automatically detects and saves important facts, decisions, and context from agent responses to the memory store.
author: swarmclaw

name: Webhook Notifier
description: Sends HTTP webhooks on agent events like task completion, errors, and tool executions. Supports Slack, Discord, and custom endpoints.
author: swarmclaw

name: Response Filter
description: Scans agent responses for sensitive data like API keys, passwords, and PII, then redacts them before display.
author: swarmclaw

name: OpenClaw Bridge
description: Bridges OpenClaw lifecycle events to SwarmClaw hooks, enabling OpenClaw-format plugins to run natively in SwarmClaw.
author: openclaw

name: Task Auto-Create
description: Parses agent responses for actionable items and automatically creates tasks on the task board with appropriate status.
author: swarmclaw

name: Cost Tracker
description: Tracks token usage and estimated costs per agent chat. Provides a tool to check current session spend.
author: openclaw

name: Context Window
description: Monitors conversation context size and warns agents when approaching model limits. Helps prevent context overflow.
author: openclaw
